name: thread-mcp
description: Thread MCP — 57 domain tools at /mcp plus official Corsair adapter at /mcp/corsair (list_operations, get_schema, run_script). Corsair Permissions, webhookHooks, API hooks, and DB search included.

corsairOfficialAdapter.note: Official Corsair MCP — agents discover and call any Gmail/Calendar endpoint dynamically via run_script.

auth.note: Option A: jwt + jwt_refresh cookies from Thread sign-in. Option B: Authorization: Bearer <THREAD_MCP_API_KEY> — must match THREAD_MCP_USER_ID env (scoped; no arbitrary X-Thread-User-Id).

tools.name: list_inbox
tools.description: List recent Gmail inbox threads via Corsair Gmail API. Returns thread metadata including sender, subject, snippet, unread status, date, and message count.

tools.name: search_inbox
tools.description: Full-text search over Gmail inbox using Corsair Gmail API. Supports Gmail query syntax (from:, subject:, has:attachment, is:unread, label:, etc.).

tools.name: get_thread
tools.description: Retrieve a full Gmail thread including all messages, sender info, and decoded body via Corsair Gmail API.

tools.name: rank_inbox
tools.description: AI-powered urgency ranking of inbox threads. Fetches threads via Corsair Gmail and scores them using OpenAI. Optionally auto-labels threads with Corsair Gmail labels (Corsair/Critical, Corsair/High Priority, etc.).

tools.name: list_labels
tools.description: List all Gmail labels (system and user-defined) via Corsair Gmail API. Call before apply_label or remove_label to get valid label IDs.

tools.name: archive_thread
tools.description: Archive a Gmail thread via Corsair (removes INBOX label). Requires explicit user intent.

tools.name: star_thread
tools.description: Star a Gmail thread via Corsair Gmail API (adds STARRED label). Use to bookmark important emails.

tools.name: unstar_thread
tools.description: Remove the star from a Gmail thread via Corsair Gmail API (removes STARRED label).

tools.name: mark_important
tools.description: Mark a Gmail thread as important via Corsair Gmail API (adds IMPORTANT label).

tools.name: mark_not_important
tools.description: Remove the important flag from a Gmail thread via Corsair Gmail API (removes IMPORTANT label).

tools.name: mark_thread_read
tools.description: Mark a Gmail thread as read via Corsair Gmail API (removes UNREAD label).

tools.name: mark_thread_unread
tools.description: Mark a Gmail thread as unread via Corsair Gmail API (adds UNREAD label). Use to flag threads for later review.

tools.name: apply_label
tools.description: Apply a Gmail label to a thread by label ID via Corsair Gmail API. Call list_labels first to get valid IDs.

tools.name: remove_label
tools.description: Remove a Gmail label from a thread by label ID via Corsair Gmail API.

tools.name: trash_thread
tools.description: Move a Gmail thread to trash via Corsair Gmail API. Use only when the user explicitly wants to delete an email.

tools.name: list_drafts
tools.description: List Gmail draft emails via Corsair Gmail API. Returns draft ID, snippet, subject, and recipient.

tools.name: get_draft
tools.description: Fetch a specific Gmail draft including full content via Corsair Gmail API.

tools.name: create_draft_email
tools.description: Create a Gmail draft without sending. Supports to, cc, bcc, subject, body, and optional threadId for replies. Uses Corsair Gmail drafts.create.

tools.name: send_draft
tools.description: Send an existing Gmail draft by draftId via Corsair Gmail drafts.send. The draft must already exist (use create_draft_email first). Requires explicit user approval.

tools.name: delete_draft
tools.description: Permanently delete a Gmail draft by ID via Corsair Gmail API.

tools.name: queue_email
tools.description: Queue an email for human approval before sending (send cap: 3/conversation). Uses Corsair Gmail API to send after approval. mode=send queues for approval; mode=draft saves as draft only.

tools.name: list_queue
tools.description: List pending (or all) approval queue items — emails and calendar invites awaiting user confirmation.

tools.name: approve_queue_item
tools.description: Approve a pending queue item — sends the email via Corsair Gmail API or creates the calendar event via Corsair Calendar API.

tools.name: dismiss_queue_item
tools.description: Dismiss (reject) a pending queue item without executing it.

tools.name: get_gmail_connection_status
tools.description: Check whether Gmail is connected via Corsair for the current user. Returns connection status and scopes.

tools.name: get_calendar_connection_status
tools.description: Check whether Google Calendar is connected via Corsair for the current user. Returns connection status and available scopes.

tools.name: list_calendar_events
tools.description: List Google Calendar events in a date range via Corsair Calendar API. Use to find free slots, meeting context, or upcoming schedule.

tools.name: get_calendar_event
tools.description: Get a single Google Calendar event by ID via Corsair Calendar API. Returns full event details including attendees, conferenceData (Google Meet link), and recurrence.

tools.name: queue_calendar_invite
tools.description: Queue a Google Calendar invite for human approval. Supports recurrence (RRULE), attendees, location, Google Meet auto-creation via conferenceData. Uses Corsair Calendar API after approval.

tools.name: quick_add_event
tools.description: Create a Google Calendar event from a natural language phrase via Corsair Calendar quickAdd API (e.g. 'Lunch with Sarah tomorrow at noon'). No approval queue — fast creation.

tools.name: reschedule_event
tools.description: Reschedule a Google Calendar event to a new time via Corsair Calendar API. Supports recurring event scope: instance, series, or following.

tools.name: update_event_details
tools.description: Update metadata (title, description, location) on a Google Calendar event via Corsair Calendar patch API. Does not change time — use reschedule_event for that.

tools.name: respond_to_event
tools.description: Accept, decline, or tentatively accept a Google Calendar event invitation via Corsair Calendar API. Sets the current user's RSVP status.

tools.name: cancel_event
tools.description: Cancel a Google Calendar event via Corsair Calendar API. Optionally sends cancellation notifications to attendees.

tools.name: check_free_busy
tools.description: Check free/busy slots for a time range via Corsair Calendar freebusy.query API. Returns busy windows and available gaps for scheduling.

tools.name: find_meeting_slots
tools.description: AI-powered meeting slot finder: queries free/busy via Corsair Calendar, then suggests optimal meeting times using OpenAI reasoning.

tools.name: get_daily_brief
tools.description: Generate an AI daily brief: today's priorities, pending replies, meeting insights, deadline risks, missed follow-ups, and recommended actions. Pulls live data from Corsair Gmail + Corsair Calendar and synthesizes via OpenAI.

tools.name: get_smart_replies
tools.description: Generate 3 AI-powered smart reply suggestions for a Gmail thread. Reads full thread context via Corsair Gmail API and generates contextual replies using OpenAI.

tools.name: get_meeting_prep
tools.description: Generate AI meeting preparation: past email context, agenda items, talking points, and risk flags. Fetches event via Corsair Calendar and related emails via Corsair Gmail + OpenAI.

tools.name: get_thread_context
tools.description: Generate a smart context summary for an email thread: related emails, key people, action items, and sentiment. Fetches thread via Corsair Gmail and synthesizes via OpenAI.

tools.name: get_missed_followups
tools.description: Detect past meetings that had no follow-up email sent. Cross-references Corsair Calendar events with Corsair Gmail sent messages using OpenAI reasoning.

tools.name: get_contact_intel
tools.description: Relationship intelligence for a contact: interaction history, response rate, communication style, and key topics. Uses Corsair Gmail + OpenAI.

tools.name: summarize_thread
tools.description: AI summary of an email thread: key decisions, action items, timeline, and next steps. Reads full thread via Corsair Gmail + OpenAI. Attachment-aware.

tools.name: mute_thread
tools.description: Mute a Gmail thread via Corsair (adds MUTE label, removes from INBOX). Future messages in this thread skip the inbox. Useful for silencing noisy threads without archiving.

tools.name: unmute_thread
tools.description: Unmute a Gmail thread via Corsair (removes MUTE label, restores to INBOX). Reverses a previous mute_thread action.

tools.name: update_draft
tools.description: Update an existing Gmail draft via Corsair drafts.update.

tools.name: batch_modify_threads
tools.description: Bulk add/remove Gmail labels on multiple threads via Corsair messages.batchModify.

tools.name: list_messages
tools.description: List Gmail messages via Corsair messages.list.

tools.name: modify_message
tools.description: Add or remove labels on a single Gmail message via Corsair messages.modify.

tools.name: delete_thread
tools.description: Permanently delete a Gmail thread via Corsair threads.delete.

tools.name: untrash_thread
tools.description: Restore a Gmail thread from trash via Corsair threads.untrash.

tools.name: search_threads_db
tools.description: Search synced Gmail threads via corsair.gmail.db.threads.search.

tools.name: search_messages_db
tools.description: Search synced Gmail messages via corsair.gmail.db.messages.search.

tools.name: search_events_db
tools.description: Search synced calendar events via googlecalendar.db.events.search.

tools.name: search_calendars_db
tools.description: Search synced calendars via googlecalendar.db.calendars.search.

tools.name: search_drafts_db
tools.description: Search synced Gmail drafts via corsair.gmail.db.drafts.search.

tools.name: search_labels_db
tools.description: Search synced Gmail labels via corsair.gmail.db.labels.search.

resources.name: Gmail Inbox
resources.description: Live Gmail inbox threads via Corsair Gmail API. Includes unread count and recent thread metadata.

resources.name: Approval Queue
resources.description: Pending email and calendar items awaiting human approval before execution via Corsair.

resources.name: Daily Brief
resources.description: Today's AI-generated brief: priorities, meetings, deadlines, and follow-ups. Cached per day.

resources.name: Google Calendar
resources.description: Upcoming Google Calendar events (next 7 days) via Corsair Calendar API.

prompts.name: daily_brief
prompts.description: Prepare a comprehensive daily brief with today's email priorities, calendar events, and recommended actions.

prompts.name: meeting_prep
prompts.description: Prepare for an upcoming meeting: past email context, agenda, talking points, and risk flags.

prompts.name: smart_reply
prompts.description: Generate contextual reply suggestions for a Gmail thread.

prompts.name: contact_intel
prompts.description: Relationship intelligence and communication history for a contact.

prompts.name: missed_followups
prompts.description: Identify past meetings that had no follow-up email sent.

examples.description: Generate AI daily brief (Corsair Gmail + Calendar + OpenAI)
AI-rank inbox and auto-label with Corsair Gmail labels
Create a calendar event from natural language (quickAdd)

arguments.text: Lunch with Sarah tomorrow at noon

examples.description: Queue an email for human approval

arguments.subject: Follow up on our meeting
arguments.body: Hi — following up on the discussion from yesterday. Could you confirm next steps?

examples.description: Find optimal meeting slots via AI + Corsair free/busy
